Summary: POC: Release Change Intelligence (DevOps AI Point 1)
Description: Pilot (3-5 releases) to correlate Jira task intent with PR/code changes before go-live. Deliverables: environment + per-release checklist completed; V1 prompt used consistently; post-release pilot note per release; optional n8n skeleton with human approval gate. Constraints: AI advisory only; no autonomous infra or Datadog writes without approval; no secrets/PII in prompts. Success: measurable reduction in ambiguous releases; documented calibration to prompt V2; zero critical policy violations. Links: Confluence page from repo export release_change_intelligence/docs/en/CONFLUENCE_RELEASE_CHANGE_INTELLIGENCE_POC.md and artefacts under release_change_intelligence/artefacts/.
Epic Name: POC: Release Change Intelligence (DevOps AI Point 1)

Summary: Align stakeholders and lock POC scope for Release Change Intelligence
Description: Run a 60-90 minute kickoff: confirm pilot services; agree minimum Jira fields (PR link service risk); agree where the analysis package is archived (Release Manager field Confluence or Jira). Acceptance: scope doc or Confluence section updated; owners named (release owner DevOps lead Security as needed).
Epic Link: POC: Release Change Intelligence (DevOps AI Point 1)

Epic Link: POC: Release Change Intelligence (DevOps AI Point 1)
